top_signals.title: Tech Leads Gain in Asian Stocks, Oil Climbs: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks rose for a second day to head for a weekly advance as investors rotated into a broader set of companies tied to the artificial intelligence buildout.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
